Week 1 Overview: Foundations of Digital Pedagogy

Introduction

This week you will define core terms, list the Bloom's taxonomy levels, and identify how formative assessment differs from summative assessment. These foundations apply to every subsequent lesson.

Key Ideas

Learners should recall, describe, and explain the six levels of Bloom's taxonomy. We will then analyze how to apply each level to a lesson plan, compare alternative sequences, and evaluate their cognitive demand.
